# "Auroral Displays of God's Splendor"
## Scripture
"The Lord has made his salvation known and revealed his righteousness to the nations." - Psalm 98:2

## Reflection
As we gaze upon the breathtaking displays of the Northern Lights, we are reminded of God's splendor and majesty. The dancing colors and swirling patterns of the aurora borealis evoke a sense of wonder and awe, drawing our attention to the celestial showcase above. Similarly, in the realm of our faith, God's salvation is a grand display of His righteousness, made known to all nations. Just as the Northern Lights illuminate the night sky, God's redemption shines brightly, illuminating the path to eternal life.

## Prayer
Dear Heavenly Father, as we marvel at the beauty of the Northern Lights, we are reminded of Your magnificent glory. May the splendor of Your salvation be on full display in our lives, shining brightly for all to see. Help us to reflect Your righteousness and share the good news of Your redemption with those around us. May our lives be a testament to Your majesty, just as the aurora borealis is a testament to Your creative power. Amen.
